Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: O God, my God, hear me; why have You forsaken me?

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: The words of my transgressions are far from my salvation.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: O my God, I will cry out by day, but You will not hear me.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: But You dwell among the saints, O praise of Israel.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Glory...both now and ever...

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Through the intercessions of the Theotokos, Savior, save us.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: O God, why have You rejected us to the end?

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Remember Your congregation You acquired from the beginning.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: This Mount Zion, where You encamped.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: God is our King before the ages; He worked salvation in the midst of the earth.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Glory...both now and ever...

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Save us, O Son of God, who were crucified in the flesh. We sing to You, Alleluia.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: The Lord reigns; let the peoples be angry.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: The Lord is great in Zion, and He is exalted.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Let them give thanks to Your great name.

Feast: Elevation of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross
Text: Save, O Lord, Your people and bless Your inheritance, granting victory to the faithful over the enemy, and by Your Cross protecting Your commonwealth.
